targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS "time",
       count(*)::double precision AS "reuse_count"
FROM audit_events
WHERE event_type = 'auth.refresh.reuse_detected'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS "time",
       COALESCE(metadata->>'reason', 'unknown') AS "metric",
       count(*)::double precision AS "value"
FROM audit_events
WHERE event_type = 'auth.refresh.rejected'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2;

WITH rejected AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS bucket,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE metadata->>'reason' = 'token_rotation_error') AS rotation_error_count,
    count(*) AS rejected_count
  FROM audit_events
  WHERE event_type = 'auth.refresh.rejected'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  GROUP BY 1
),
success AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS bucket,
    count(*) AS success_count
  FROM audit_events
  WHERE event_type = 'auth.refresh.success'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(s.bucket, r.bucket) AS "time",
  CASE
    WHEN (COALESCE(r.rejected_count, 0) + COALESCE(s.success_count, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE COALESCE(r.rotation_error_count, 0)::double precision
         / (COALESCE(r.rejected_count, 0) + COALESCE(s.success_count, 0))::double precision
  END AS "rotation_error_ratio"
FROM success s
FULL OUTER JOIN rejected r ON s.bucket = r.bucket
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS "time",
       count(*)::double precision AS "login_locked_count"
FROM audit_events
WHERE event_type = 'auth.login.locked'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'auth.refresh.reuse_detected') AS reuse_last_15m,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'auth.refresh.rejected' AND metadata->>'reason' = 'token_rotation_error') AS rotation_error_last_15m,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'auth.login.locked') AS login_locked_last_15m
FROM audit_events
WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '15 minutes';
